title: lonicera chrysantha subsp. gibbiflora
intro: Lonicera chrysantha subsp. gibbiflora, also known as the golden honeysuckle or climbing honeysuckle, is a perennial, evergreen climber belonging to the Lonicera genus. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial activities. The health benefits of Lonicera chrysantha subsp. gibbiflora include its potential to help reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support the immune system. In traditional medicine, the plant is often used to prepare infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, as well as being used in combination with other herbs for various health issues.
